nodes.name: Black-cheeked woodpecker
nodes.summary: Black-cheeked woodpecker（Black-cheeked woodpecker，学名 Melanerpes pucherani），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于常綠森林、次生林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved 24 July 2022 The black-cheeked woodpecker inhabits the interior and edges of humid to wet evergreen forest, mature secondary forest and abandoned plantations, and clearings with scattered trees

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved 24 July 2022 The black-cheeked woodpecker inhabits the interior and edges of humid to wet evergreen forest, mature secondary forest and abandoned plantations, and clearings with scattered trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It occurs in several protected areas, but "[n]umbers decline with extensive deforestation."
